title: GGUF resident decode graph replay and GPU sampling

change.summary: Qwen35GGUFResidentSession now keeps decode token/position state on device, samples with a GPU GGUF lm-head plus argmax, and exposes a one-step HIP graph replay path used by public LLM.generate for remaining greedy decode tokens.
implemented: device-side token scalar updates via runtime_state set_i64_scalar
device-side position/context set and advance via runtime_state set_decode_position_i64 / advance_decode_position_i64
GGUF Q6_K embedding lookup consumes device token IDs inside eager and graph decode
GGUF Q6_K lm-head writes FP32 logits and argmax_f32 keeps greedy sampling on GPU
capture_decode_graph(position, steps_per_replay=1, max_replay_steps, record_steps) records generated token IDs into a device int64 buffer
public GGUF generator replays the one-step graph after the initial prefill sample
caveats: This is a correctness/profiler diagnostic, not a promoted throughput row.
The graph captures the resident c=1 decode path; public full-model prefill is still token-serial until the linear-attention bulk scheduler path lands.

rocprof_graph_replay.command: env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-file gguf_task48_decode_graph --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task48-rocprof.D4qqHI -- python3 /tmp/profile_gguf_task48_graph.py
rocprof_graph_replay.resident_state_evidence: Profiled graph run generated 4 fixture IDs with session.position=6 after prompt length 3 plus 3 graph replays. Kernel counts include 6 Q6_K embedding lookups and 36 full-attention KV append/decode launches, matching 6 resident token steps across 6 full-attention layers rather than full-context recompute per generated token. Device runtime-state kernels appear for the 3 replayed tokens: set_i64_scalar only during prefill, then advance_decode_position_i64 and record_i64_scalar_indexed once per graph replay.

validation.targeted_tests_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_llm_gguf_generate_path.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_gguf_e2e_acceptance.py tests/test_llm_generate.py tests/test_model_quant_and_imports.py tests/test_gguf_ops.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_tokenizer.py tests/test_aotriton_discovery.py -q
